name: PAX West 2026
location: Seattle Convention Center, Seattle, United States
description: PAX West is a celebration of gaming and gaming culture featuring thought-provoking panels, a massive expo hall filled with the best publishers and studios, new game demos, musical performances, tournaments, and a community experience unlike any other.
short_description: A celebration of gaming and gaming culture — panels, a massive expo hall, new game demos, musical performances, and tournaments.
